10502975.title: Something's Killing Me
10502975.description: Thomas Rybinski was treated for suspected meningitis, but his condition worsened. When other patients began to have the same symptoms, doctors had to act fast to save lives.

10510915.title: Something's Killing Me
10510915.description: Changes started subtly for twins Addi and Cassi, but after medical testing it was discovered they had a strange, genetic disease that causes progressive neurological deterioration.

10577995.title: Something's Killing Me
10577995.description: Mark Staudte abruptly became ill, experiencing seizures and his skin turning yellow. Within 48 hours, Mark died, and five months later, his son developed similar symptoms.

10601298.title: Something's Killing Me
10601298.description: Seven Chicago residents died under mysterious medical circumstances. Diagnoses included cardiac arrest, stroke and aneurism. However, a connection is made to all seven victims.

10625333.title: Something's Killing Me
10625333.description: Jeanna Giese complains to her parents that she's fatigued and has numbness in her arm. Doctors speculate that it might be Lyme disease or West Nile, but what Jeanna has is far more sinister.

10648122.title: Something's Killing Me
10648122.description: Florida college student Lindsey Meyer and Michigan E.M.T Kevin Nesbit both come down with a painful sore throat. What seem like symptoms of a common cold, soon spiral into a life or death situation.

10596012.title: Something's Killing Me
10596012.description: Paul and Alison Frase were told their child's disorder had no treatment and no cure. Scientists tell them their one hope depends on finding a dog and the right genetic code - the search begins.

10577518.title: Something's Killing Me
10577518.description: Dr. Bill Lidner collapses after returning home from a family trip overseas; his daughters find him bleeding; they don't know it, but it's the first sign that something's very wrong.

10601558.title: Something's Killing Me
10601558.description: Several doctors and CDC authorities spend months trying to figure out what California honeymooners, a surfer in Hawaii and a toddler in Tennessee have in common.

10624945.title: Something's Killing Me
10624945.description: What really happens when we die? For thousands of years, the dreams and visions of the dying have captivated cultures. But what are they - what causes them? And are they real?
